---
title: "The Rev. Canon George Edward Jelf"
---

## The Rev. Canon George Edward Jelf

**Dates:** (29 Jan1834 -19 Nov 1908)

### Description

Vicar of Saffron Walden

### Biography

He married (1861) Fanny Crawley (d. 1865);  three of their four children died in 1871. He married secondly (20 Jan 1876), Katharine Frances Dalton, and had four more children.  He was a canon of Rochester in 1880 and of St. Albans in 1878, master of the Charterhouse in 1907.  He was son of R. W. Jelf, principal of KCL 1844-69 and a friend of Keble and Pusey. His first wife’s biography is in G.E.Jelf <i>A Memoir</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from April 12, 1894.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
